quick_skim.title: HiERO-StepG @ Ego4D Step Grounding Challenge: hierarchical activity understanding enables zero-shot step grounding
quick_skim.abstract: Procedural activities follow well-defined structures: whether we consider a cooking recipe or a mechanic repairing a car, these activities naturally decompose in a hierarchy of steps and sub-steps. Traditional approaches for step grounding require extensive annotations and scale poorly. Instead, we argue that such hierarchical structure can emerge naturally from uncurated videos of human activities through recurring patterns of co-occurring actions and activities. Our approach builds on HiERO, a weakly-supervised representation learning approach that maps close in the feature space actions that are functionally related to each other, leveraging only fine-grained action-level narrations. In this feature space, procedure steps can be detected by a simple clustering, with no additional task-specific fine-tuning. For the Ego4D Step Grounding challenge, we augment this approach by ensuring fine and coarse level agreement in step assignments, enforcing strict temporal monotonicity of the grounded steps and post-processing the detected steps to reduce the impact of noisy predictions. We call this approach HiERO-StepG and it achieves 56.27 % on the R@1 (IoU = 0.3) metric on the global leaderboard at submission time, ranking second while being completely zero-shot and not requiring procedure-specific annotations. Project page: https://github.com/andreazenotto/HiERO-StepG.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: zero-shot step grounding with hierarchical activity decomposition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 零样本步骤接地与层次化活动分解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 零样本步骤接地与层次化活动分解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 零样本步骤接地与层次化活动分解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a weakly-supervised approach using hierarchical activity structures for zero-shot step grounding in procedural videos, leveraging co-occurring actions without annotations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对程序性视频中的步骤接地任务，提出利用层次化活动结构的弱监督方法HiERO。该方法通过挖掘共现动作的模式，在无需标注的情况下实现零样本步骤接地。实验表明该方法能有效泛化到未见步骤，为组合动作识别提供了可迁移的层次化表示。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对程序性视频中的步骤接地任务，提出利用层次化活动结构的弱监督方法HiERO。该方法通过挖掘共现动作的模式，在无需标注的情况下实现零样本步骤接地。实验表明该方法能有效泛化到未见步骤，为组合动作识别提供了可迁移的层次化表示。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 零样本组合动作识别, especially work that connects or combines: zero-shot learning for action recognition; compositional action recognition methods; zero-shot action recognition with composition; zero shot compositional action recognition methods; learning to recognize unseen action compositions; compositional action recognition without training samples.
